reviews.comment:
Parada obligada al volver de la costa. Mesas bajo los árboles, lugar amplio y cómodo.  La estación es impecable

(Translated by Google)
A must-stop on the way back from the coast. Tables under the trees, a spacious and comfortable place. The station is spotless.

reviews.comment:
Excelente Atención! Angel súper atento
y Cordial! Destaco tambo la atención del Playero!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service! Angel was super attentive and friendly! I also want to highlight the service from the attendant!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT2pObE1VZDNTSFF4WVRWMWJFZGFTRE5vT0VaMllrRRAB

reviews.comment:
Muy caro y poca atención al cliente y socio no te podes servir como antes y dependes de ellos por una factura tardas 20 minutos y te dan la que se le canta a ellos .no me gustó no perdería media hora de viaje por un café

(Translated by Google)
Very expensive and poor customer service. You can't get the same level of service as before, and you're completely dependent on them. It takes 20 minutes to get a bill, and they give you whatever they feel like. I didn't like it; I wouldn't waste half an hour of travel for a coffee.

reviewReply.comment: Buenos días , lamentamos lo sucedido. Tu mensaje nos ayuda a mejorar y a continuar trabajando para una mejor atención. Te pedimos disculpas y te invitamos a volver a pasar. Saludos
